df_results = df_results %>%
  # Seleccionar solo las 4 métricas de selección ya transformadas
  select(Samples, thresh) %>%
  # Pivotear a formato largo para ggplot
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -thresh,
    names_to = "Group",
    values_to = "Perc"
  )  %>%
  group_by(Samples, thresh, Group) %>%
  summarise(Mean = mean(desirability), .groups = "drop")
